message: Node started: Analyze the structure of a Trie built from the given N bitstrings. Identify all nodes that represent the end of an original ID. Determine the minimum number of bits that must be added to each ID such that no ID is a prefix of another. Specifically, for every node that is an end-of-string marker, ensure it has no descendants that are also end-of-string markers by extending the current string or its descendants.
